responses.question_text: Now that you've seen all 5 concepts, please rank them from most to least appealing. Pick your top 3.
responses.raw_answer: ["Dove Skip", "Dove 60-Second Body Spray", "Dove Night Wash", "Dove Yours & Mine", "Dove Skin ID"]
responses.reasoning: Based on the participant's expressed interest levels and appeal ratings, Dove Skip ranks highest due to its strong functional benefit (12-hour moisturization), followed by the Dove 60-Second Body Spray for its time-saving promise, then Dove Night Wash for its calming clinical benefits; Dove Yours & Mine and Dove Skin ID are less preferred due to price concerns and need for stronger clinical validation.
